Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 233 

PLAN_ID_06 (previous year) 

LABEL: Part D Plan Benefit Package Identifier for Previous Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) number for the Part D plan sponsor's contract. 
CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a Part D plan sponsor has with CMS. This 
was the Plan ID for the plan in 2006. It may or may not be the same
